channel.title: Comparison on Maven AI
channel.description: Recent content in Comparison on Maven AI

item.title: ProductiveBot vs Claude Cowork: What's Actually Different?
item.description: ProductiveBot isn't just OpenClaw with a different name. It's OpenClaw + skills + workflows + infrastructure. Here's what that actually means.

item.title: OpenClaw vs Claude Cowork: When to Use Each (Real-World Comparison)
item.description: OpenClaw and Claude Cowork solve different problems. Here's when to use each, based on 4 days of real-world experience building Maven AI.
